sub_modules.gaussian_blur_3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil kernel with coefficients 1 2 1 / 2 4 2 / 1 2 1 and divide-by-16 normalization.
sub_modules.pointwise_subtract: Combinational pointwise high-frequency extraction: original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.pointwise_gain: Combinational signed scaling of the high-frequency component by the runtime gain input.
sub_modules.pointwise_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction with saturation to the output pixel range.
